deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, profit $42-62K. 31 comps, avg $207K. Template building for property analysis tool.
deals.next: Pull MLS comps and RPR report. Build first analysis sheet. Lock template for phase 3.

logs.m: Deal received via Homestead Vested link. Used for analysis tool template.

deals.title: Borregas Land
deals.notes: Land listing terminated. Sisters ended listing after March. Signs picked up last week. Isaac development interest did not move forward. Title defect resolved but no path forward.
deals.next: Relationship intact. Available for future opportunities.

logs.m: Listing canceled. Signs retrieved. No path forward with sisters or development concept.
Isaac interest in mobile home development for ~$150K if project moves forward.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Sellers moving back in to make updates and repairs. Plan to relist when ready. Relationship intact, ended on good terms. Underwater by $93-143K. Chandler was laid off (hardship documented).
deals.next: Follow up when they are ready to relist.

logs.m: Listing terminated. Sellers moving back in. Termination release sent for signatures.
Honest conversation with sellers. Chandler laid off. Short sale most likely path if listing happens.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: Listed May 14. 3BR/2.5BA, 1,886 sqft, Laura Heights PUD. Sellers relocating to NC second week June. Second-look buyers are hottest lead. Pre-inspection report offered.
deals.next: Confirm May 30 showing time. Follow up with second-look buyers agent. Monitor for backup offer.

logs.m: Second-look buyers back for second showing. Offered pre-inspection report. Rescheduled showing to May 30.
Investor cash offer at $176,300 discussed. Keeping conversation open.
MLS live. First showing 9:15am. Cultural concern flagged by MK about street direction.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA, 1,809 sqft, 4.05 acres, Frio County. Payoff ~$257K. Recommended list $295K. CMA pulled. Thin market - 3 comps in 10 miles. Divorce situation.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter. Confirm acreage and renovation status. Get listing agreement signed. Schedule professional photos.

logs.m: Met at property. CMA pulled. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 2026. Net sheet built.
Chris helped with original VA renovation loan purchase. Going through divorce. Need to sell.

deals.title: Tilden 20 Acres
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Under contract with Espinoza buyers at $113K. Earnest money not yet received. TXR 1903 amendment sent to buyer's agent Javier. Chicago Title escrow opened.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received and signed amendment back from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email domain.

logs.m: New buyers Espinoza accepted at $113K. Amendment sent to buyer's agent Javier.
Price reduced to $117,500. MLS updated. Steve signed amendment.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Cash transaction $152K. Closed and funded Apr 26-27, 2026. Lien resolved via Fernando Castillo signature. Military buyer (Sam VanDenheuvel, Exquisite SA).
deals.next: Deliver Joy gift. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel. Thank Michael (notary) and UPS Store staff.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded.
Fernando signed lien release at mobile notary. Delivered to Chicago Title same day.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned foreclosure. Renovation in progress with HouzzPro (Matt Toney). Floor demo complete, drywall cutting done. Police reports pending. Utilities pending activation.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric and EMCSUD to confirm status. Replace camera batteries. Submit listing agreement to Jerry and Ray.

logs.m: Drywall crew actively patching. Sent photos to Kelly. Police reports still stalled.
Floor demo complete. Drywall cut. New drywall on site. Utility providers confirmed.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss
deals.notes: Grace Gardens rental. Jimbo backed out of arrangement May 28. Chris sent $500 for time/costs invested. Ended on good terms.
deals.next: Confirm signed release received back from Jimbo.

logs.m: Release sent to Jimbo. Payment received. Relationship intact - closed out clean.
Jimbo backed out. Chris sent $500.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold. Pivoting to new construction. Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal as of Jun 1. Still searching. Pre-approved ~$122K (Zach Schaphorst MTG Broker).
leads.next: Revisit new construction search. Identify no-HOA builder options.

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal - too much for them. Still actively searching.
Evaluated 301 W Saxet wholesale deal (Isaac). Mike and Isaac scheduled phone call.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: Brandon Moran mom. New construction buyer. Budget $50K down, target ~$1K/month payment (P+I). Not locked to any builder. Rate buydowns are the angle.
leads.next: Confirm buyer rep signed. Pull new construction options from all builders. Set up builder visit.

logs.m: MI Homes option from Frank still in play. Need to follow up with Milagros on timeline and interest.
Buyer rep sent. Multiple builder options being explored across rate scenarios.

leads.title: Bryce + Wife
leads.detail: Met at 181 CR 7751 (dumpster contractor). Wife is active military. Recently moved from Ohio. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area. Zero down, no PMI eligibility.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Qualify wife for VA eligibility. Send VA Buyers Guide.

logs.m: Met on-site at Priority Bank property. Wife is active military, VA loan eligible.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: Met at garden event May 9. Property at 13810 Tangle Tree St planning to sell soon. ~90% complete. Already working with another realtor but open to Chris for pre-market buyers or if current relationship stalls.
leads.next: Follow up on finishing progress. Offer to promote to Chris buyer network. Stay relational.

logs.m: Met at garden event. Has property 90% complete. Already working with another realtor.

leads.title: Kurt
leads.detail: Neighbor around 9815 Conbes. Interested in nearby listing under contract at $275K. Wants intel on offers received. Need to determine if seller or buyer lead.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurt area. Get offer details from listing agent on 9815 Conbes. Report back.

logs.m: Priority to pull CMA and set up listing timeline.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Jerome Gardner (downline agent, Schertz/Cibolo) has a buyer interested in a fixer property. Unique situation. Details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome. Get buyer and property details. Identify matching inventory.

logs.m: Caught up with Jerome. Details pending on buyer and fixer situation.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through garden group. Grief to healing to plants story. Potential content collaboration with permission. Long-term real estate potential (trust-based).
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission for content. Keep nurturing - no rush on real estate.

logs.m: Connected through garden community conversation. Content angle identified.

leads.title: Miss Pat's Neighbor Son
leads.detail: Son inherited house from deceased gardener parent (avid plants/gardening person). Son name unknown. Contact unknown. Warm intro available through Miss Pat (neighbor).
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat. Reach out to son - neighbor and gardener first. Assess if keeping, renting, or selling.

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor behind her may have passed. Son is new owner. Avid gardener.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship. Helped Brandon get started in real estate. Two opportunities: (1) Uncle Jimbo rental at 8527 Green Bliss (backed out May 28), (2) Mom Milagros new construction buyer (active). Brandon is connector.
leads.next: Debrief Brandon on Jimbo situation. Focus energy on Milagros new construction. Confirm she has signed buyer rep.

logs.m: Jimbo backed out of rental arrangement. Chris sent $500 to Brandon for costs.
Brandon's mom (Milagros) is new construction buyer prospect. Multiple builder options being explored.

leads.title: Isaac Linares
leads.detail: Investor and referral source. Linares Capital LLC. Referred 10023 Mill Path listing (active). Wholesale deals (301 W Saxet). Mobile home development interest. Partnership-oriented.
leads.next: Thank Isaac after Mill Path closes. Continue deal flow relationship. Keep updated on new opportunities.

logs.m: 10023 Mill Path showing well. Isaac referral performing.
301 W Saxet wholesale deal (Mike and Alice Howell) - couple backed out.
